violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Knife was observed being stored in between the prep unit and prep table. In-use utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Knife was moved t0 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Walk-in cooler fans -Ice machine -Prep unit Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with a brown/yellow biofilm The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to clean and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
